text: What if your choices are more predictable than you think? Prospect theory explains how we evaluate potential losses and gains differently. We fear losses more than we value gains. Think about it—why do we hesitate to invest? Studies show we’d rather avoid losing $100 than gain $150. That’s powerful. Understanding this helps us make better decisions. Are you ready to rethink your choices? Curious about your own decision-making? Like and follow for more insights!
